race.description: Racing Wa Provincial Series Heat Handicap (C5)
race.comment: AZENA (6) just missed on the Scarpside at Pinjarra two back but bolted in at  Belmont last start when the race favourite in a CL3. The wide draw is a niggle, though she has the speed to roll across from out wide. Can sit handy to the speed once again and can repeat the dose. DECORATION (2) was very good first-up in stronger company at Pinjarra, being caught late to finish 0.3L off the winner. Cheung's claim comes in handy and he has the speed to get across. He's won 2/4 second-up and there's plenty to like. RETURN OF THE MACH (10) finished off strongly last time out at Ascot and should be better suited getting out in trip now. The inside draw this time is a big tick for her, as is the drop in weight. Fiore reunites and she can be there when it matters most. MANHATTAN STRIP (4) is better than we saw last time out and can improve with Pike on board and a drop in grade. SEINDEEL (7) can improve now third-up into the campaign.
